testcase.name: Story 1.1: Admin User Management › [P0-E2E-012] should allow admin to create new user with default capability
Story 1.1: Admin User Management › [P0-E2E-013] should allow admin to assign multiple capabilities to user
Story 1.1: Admin User Management › [P0-E2E-014] should perform soft delete and prevent login
Story 1.1: Admin User Management › [P0-E2E-015] should show users list with admin capabilities
Story 1.1: Forced Password Reset Flow › [P0-E2E-005] should redirect to /change-password when forcePasswordReset is true
testcase.system-out: ✅ Database is available and healthy ✅ Test user tecnico@hiansa.com verified ✅ Test user new.user@example.com verified After login, current URL: http://localhost:3000/cambiar-password ✅ Database is available and healthy ✅ Test user tecnico@hiansa.com verified ✅ Test user new.user@example.com verified After login, current URL: http://localhost:3000/cambiar-password

testcase.name: Story 1.1: Forced Password Reset Flow › [P0-E2E-006] should block navigation to other routes until password is changed
Story 1.1: Forced Password Reset Flow › [P0-E2E-007] should allow password change and redirect to dashboard
testcase.system-out:
Browser console: %cDownload the React DevTools for a better development experience: https://reactjs.org/link/react-devtools font-weight:bold Browser console: [LoginForm] Attempting login with email: new.user@example.com Browser console: [LoginForm] Login result: {error: null, status: 200, ok: true, url: http://localhost:3000/login} Browser console: [LoginForm] result.ok: true result.error: null result.url: http://localhost:3000/login Browser console: [LoginForm] Session after login: {user: Object, expires: 2026-03-14T20:08:41.121Z} Browser console: [LoginForm] forcePasswordReset value: true Browser console: [LoginForm] forcePasswordReset is true, redirecting to /cambiar-password Submit button enabled: [33mtrue[39m Change password API response status: [33m200[39m Change password API response body: {"success":true,"message":"Contraseña cambiada exitosamente"} Browser console: %cDownload the React DevTools for a better development experience: https://reactjs.org/link/react-devtools font-weight:bold Browser console: [LoginForm] Attempting login with email: new.user@example.com Browser console: [LoginForm] Login result: {error: null, status: 200, ok: true, url: http://localhost:3000/login} Browser console: [LoginForm] result.ok: true result.error: null result.url: http://localhost:3000/login Browser console: [LoginForm] Session after login: {user: Object, expires: 2026-03-14T20:08:51.207Z} Browser console: [LoginForm] forcePasswordReset value: false Browser console: %cDownload the React DevTools for a better development experience: https://reactjs.org/link/react-devtools font-weight:bold

testcase.name: Story 1.1: Forced Password Reset Flow › [P0-E2E-008] should validate password strength on change
Story 1.1: Login Authentication Flow › [P0-E2E-001] should display login form with required fields and testids
testcase.system-out: ✅ Database is available and healthy ✅ Test user tecnico@hiansa.com verified ✅ Test user new.user@example.com verified

testcase.name: Story 1.1: Login Authentication Flow › [P0-E2E-002] should login successfully with valid credentials and redirect to dashboard
Story 1.1: Login Authentication Flow › [P0-E2E-003] should show error message with invalid credentials
testcase.system-out: ✅ Database is available and healthy ✅ Test user tecnico@hiansa.com verified ✅ Test user new.user@example.com verified

testcase.name: Story 1.1: User Profile Management › [P0-E2E-009] should display user profile with current information
Story 1.1: User Profile Management › [P0-E2E-010] should allow user to edit own profile
Story 1.1: User Profile Management › [P0-E2E-011] should allow user to change password from profile
Story 1.2: PBAC System with 15 Capabilities (ATDD - RED PHASE) › [P0-E2E-020] should display 15 capability checkboxes with Spanish labels
Story 1.2: PBAC System with 15 Capabilities (ATDD - RED PHASE) › [P0-E2E-021] should have correct data-testid for each capability checkbox
Story 1.2: PBAC System with 15 Capabilities (ATDD - RED PHASE) › [P0-E2E-023] should create new user with only can_create_failure_report checked by default
Story 1.2: PBAC System with 15 Capabilities (ATDD - RED PHASE) › [P0-E2E-025] should allow admin to assign multiple capabilities to user
Story 1.2: PBAC System with 15 Capabilities (ATDD - RED PHASE) › [P0-E2E-028] should deny access to /assets for users without can_manage_assets capability
Story 1.2: PBAC System with 15 Capabilities (ATDD - RED PHASE) › [P0-E2E-031] should deny access to repair history for users without can_view_repair_history
Story 1.2: PBAC System with 15 Capabilities (ATDD - RED PHASE) › [P0-E2E-033] should assign all 15 capabilities to initial admin user
Story 1.2: PBAC System with 15 Capabilities (ATDD - RED PHASE) › [P0-E2E-035] should show only navigation items for user capabilities
Story 1.2: PBAC System with 15 Capabilities (ATDD - RED PHASE) › [P0-E2E-037] should deny access when accessing unauthorized module via direct URL
